info.title: Buildstash API (Beta)
info.description: Buildstash API beta release. Read-only endpoints for workspaces, applications, builds, releases, and webhooks, plus the full upload flow. Additional endpoints will be available in upcoming releases.

tags.name: Applications
tags.description: Application CRUD and sub-resources (streams, labels, platforms, members)

tags.name: Builds
tags.description: Build listing, detail, download, and metadata updates

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook CRUD, request history, and testing

tags.name: Uploads
tags.description: Build file upload flow (request, multipart, verify, abort, metadata)

get.description: Retrieve information about the workspace associated with the API key. No scope required.
List all members of the workspace. Requires `members:read` scope. Only available with workspace-level API keys; application-level keys should use `/applications/{application_id}/members`.
List all workspace-level labels. These are shared across all applications in the workspace. Requires `workspace:read` scope.
Get a single workspace-level label by ID or name. Requires `workspace:read` scope.
List the workspace's default stream templates. These templates are copied into new applications when they are created. Requires `workspace:read` scope.
List all workspace-level custom targets. These are shared across all applications in the workspace that use the target's platform. Requires `workspace:read` scope.
Get a single workspace-level custom target by ID or name. Requires `workspace:read` scope.
Get basic information about a workspace member. No scope required. User must be in the same workspace.
List applications accessible by the API key. Workspace keys see all apps; Application keys see only their app. Requires `applications:read` scope.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by platform slug (e.g. `ios`, `android`, `windows`). Returns 422 if the platform does not exist.

get.description: Retrieve a specific application. Requires `applications:read` scope for Workspace keys. Application keys can access their own app without scope.
List members with their resolved roles for the application. Requires `applications:read` (workspace key) or `members:read` (application key) scope.
List all active streams for an application. Requires `applications:read` (workspace key) or `application:read` (application key) scope.
Get a single application stream by ID or name. Requires `applications:read` (workspace key) or `application:read` (application key) scope.

parameters.name: stream_identifier
parameters.description: Stream ID or name (name must be unique within the application)

get.description: List all labels available to an application (both application-level and workspace-level). Requires `applications:read` (workspace key) or `application:read` (application key) scope.
Get a single label available to the application (workspace-level or application-level) by ID or name. Requires `applications:read` (workspace key) or `application:read` (application key) scope.

404.description: Label not found for this application

get.description: List platforms attached to the application. Requires `applications:read` (workspace key) or `application:read` (application key) scope.

List all custom targets available for this application, including both workspace-level and application-level targets for platforms attached to the app. Requires `applications:read` (workspace key) or `application:read` (application key) scope.

Get a single custom target available to the application by ID or name. Includes both workspace-level and application-level targets. Requires `applications:read` (workspace key) or `application:read` (application key) scope.

404.description: Custom target not found for this application

get.description: List all non-pending builds for an application with filtering and sorting. Requires `builds:read` scope.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by field. `version` sorts by full semantic version, `version_short` sorts by core version (major.minor.patch).

parameters.name: platforms
parameters.description: Filter by platform slugs. Accepts a single slug or comma-separated list (e.g. `ios`, `android,ios`). Returns 422 if any slug is invalid.

parameters.name: streams
parameters.description: Filter by stream ID or name. Accepts a single value or comma-separated list. Returns 422 if any identifier is invalid for this application.

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Filter by label ID or name. Accepts a single value or comma-separated list. Returns 422 if any identifier is invalid for this application.

parameters.name: custom_targets
parameters.description: Filter by custom target ID or name. Accepts a single value or comma-separated list. Scoped to targets available to this application (workspace-level and application-level). If the workspace plan does not include custom target access, this filter is ignored and a note is included in the response message. Returns 422 if any identifier is invalid.

200.description: Builds retrieved. Note: `application_id` and `workspace_id` are omitted from build objects in list responses.

message.example: The platform identifier android2 is invalid.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific build. Includes `ios_info`, `android_info`, `primary_file`, `expansion_files`, and `metadata_artifacts` when available. Requires `builds:read` scope.
Get temporary presigned download URLs for a build's files. Includes expansion files and universal APK when available. Requires `builds:read` scope.

expansion_files.description: Present only when the build has expansion files.

universal_apk.description: Present only for Android builds that have a universal APK.

get.description: List all metadata artifacts attached to a build. Requires `builds:read` scope.
Get details of a single metadata artifact attached to a build. Requires `builds:read` scope.
Get a temporary presigned download URL for a specific metadata artifact. Requires `builds:read` scope.

message.example: Successfully retrieved temporary download URL for metadata artifact.

get.description: List all releases for an application with filtering and sorting. Requires `releases:read` scope.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by field. `version` sorts by full semantic version, `version_short` sorts by core version (major.minor.patch).

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Filter by label ID or name. Accepts a single value or comma-separated list. Returns 422 if any identifier is invalid.

parameters.name: platforms
parameters.description: Filter by platform slugs. Accepts a single slug or comma-separated list. Returns releases containing builds on those platforms. Returns 422 if any slug is invalid.

200.description: Releases retrieved. In list responses, `notes`, `application_id`, and `workspace_id` are omitted.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific release. Requires `releases:read` scope.
List all webhooks for an application. Requires `webhooks:read` scope.

post.description: Initiate a build file upload by requesting presigned URLs. Requires `builds:create` scope.

schema.description: Initiate a build file upload. At least one version component must be greater than zero.

application_id.description: Application ID. Required when using a Workspace API key.

structure.description: Upload structure type. Use 'file' unless including an Android OBB expansion file.

custom_target.description: Custom target for this build. Must exactly match the name of the target you've defined.

stream.description: Stream name. Must match exact name setup in your app.

size_bytes.description: Size of the file in bytes (max 50GB for primary file)
Size of the file in bytes (max 5GB for expansion file)

expansion_files.description: Expansion files (only include if structure is 'file+expansion')

version_component_meta.description: Optional metadata such as build number or commit hash

custom_build_number.description: Custom build number. Alphanumeric characters, dots, underscores, and hyphens only.

labels.description: Labels for the build (will be created if they don't already exist)

architectures.description: Architectures this build supports (the platform must also support the architecture)

415.description: Unsupported media type or file too large

post.description: Request a presigned URL for the next chunk of a multipart upload. Requires `builds:create` scope.
Verify that an upload completed successfully and finalize the build. Requires `builds:create` scope.
Abort an in-progress upload. Requires `builds:create` scope.
Request a presigned URL to upload a metadata artifact for a build. Requires `builds:create` scope.
Verify that a metadata artifact upload completed successfully. Requires `builds:create` scope.

build_count.description: Only included when retrieving a single application, not in list views.

Build.description: A build. In list responses, `application_id` and `workspace_id` are omitted. Sub-resources like `primary_file`, `expansion_files`, `metadata_artifacts`, `ios_info`, and `android_info` are only included when fetching a single build.

primary_file.description: Only included when fetching a single build.

expansion_files.description: Only included when fetching a single build.

metadata_artifacts.description: Only included when fetching a single build.

ios_info.description: iOS-specific build info. Only included when fetching a single build.

android_info.description: Android-specific build info. Only included when fetching a single build.

modal_url.description: Direct URL to the build detail page in the web app.

download_url.description: URL to initiate a build download via the web app.

Release.description: A release. In list responses, `notes`, `application_id`, and `workspace_id` are omitted.

notes.description: Markdown release notes. Only included when retrieving a single release, not in list views.

build_count.description: Included on list views where full builds are omitted.

builds.description: Full build objects. Only included when retrieving a single release, not in list views.

Stream.description: An application stream. When returned in a list under an application, `application_id` and `workspace_id` are omitted.

application_id.description: Omitted when listed under the parent application.

workspace_id.description: Omitted when listed under the parent workspace.

Label.description: A build/release label. When returned in a list under an application or workspace, parent ID fields are omitted.

application_id.description: Omitted when listed under the parent.

workspace_id.description: Omitted when listed under the parent.

WorkspaceLabel.description: A workspace-level label returned from the workspace labels endpoint (parent IDs omitted).

DefaultStream.description: A workspace default stream template. Copied into new applications on creation.

CustomTarget.description: A custom build target tied to a platform. When returned in a list under an application or workspace, parent ID fields are omitted.

application_id.description: Omitted when listed under the parent.

workspace_id.description: Omitted when listed under the parent.

expires_at.description: Must be in the future and within 1 year from now.

latest_webhook_request.description: Only included when fetching a single webhook, not in list views.

PrimaryFile.description: The primary file of a build. Parent IDs are omitted when nested under a Build.

build_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

application_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

workspace_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

ExpansionFile.description: An expansion file attached to a build. Parent IDs are omitted when nested under a Build.

build_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

application_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

workspace_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

MetadataArtifact.description: A metadata artifact attached to a build. Parent IDs are omitted when nested under a Build.

build_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

application_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

workspace_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

BuildIosInfo.description: iOS-specific build information. `build_id` is omitted when nested under a Build.

build_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

BuildAndroidInfo.description: Android-specific build information. `build_id` is omitted when nested under a Build.

build_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Build.

WebhookRequest.description: A webhook delivery attempt. Headers are filtered to safe allowlists and response payloads are truncated to 1 KB. Parent IDs are omitted when nested under a Webhook.

request_headers.description: Filtered to safe headers only (content-type, user-agent, etc.). Sensitive headers like X-Webhook-Signature are redacted.

response_headers.description: Filtered to safe headers only (content-type, date, content-length).

webhook_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Webhook.

workspace_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Webhook.

application_id.description: Omitted when nested under a Webhook.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

Forbidden.description: Forbidden - insufficient scope or access denied

bearerAuth.description: API key. Bearer authentication header of the form `Bearer <token>`, where `<token>` is your Workspace or Application API key.
